content:
## Eligibility Requirements
Confirm the customer's current relationship before starting an account-opening request. Apply the matching rule for the requested account class:

| Account requested | Required condition |
| --- | --- |
| checking | customer_exists |
| savings | personal_checking_open_for_at_least_14_days |
| business_checking | personal_checking_open, no_closed_accounts |
| business_savings | business_checking_open_for_at_least_30_days, no_negative_balances |

A customer who does not meet the listed condition cannot be opened in that account class during the interaction. Give the customer the specific unmet condition and, when relevant, direct them to the account they must hold first. See "Checking Account Comparison Guide" and "Savings Account Comparison Guide" for product comparison language.

## Opening Procedure
1. Identify the requested account class exactly before using any write action.
2. Verify the customer record and the relationship history needed for that class.
3. If the eligibility check passes, use the account-opening tool pattern open_bank_account_{suffix}.
4. Supply only the required arguments: user_id, account_type, account_class.

## Tool Access Notes
The account-opening tool is a WRITE action and requires unlock: True. Do not proceed if the customer has not provided enough information to populate the required arguments. For hidden-tool handling and suffix selection, see "Internal: Deposit Account Hidden Tool Docs".
title: Internal: Deposit Account Opening Eligibility
